name: TitleMax Title Pawns
description_short: TitleMax provides title pawns in Georgia using your vehicle title as collateral for same-day cash. Most credit types accepted; you keep driving your car.
description_long:
TitleMax is a national title lending company with the Candler Road SE location in Atlanta operating since July 2004, giving it over two decades of presence serving the greater Atlanta area. The company operates multiple locations across Georgia and other states, with this branch situated between Memorial Drive and Glenwood Road near St. Phillips AME Church. TitleMax structures its Georgia products as title pawns rather than title loans, which reflects the state's specific regulatory framework for collateral-based short-term lending.

The primary product offered is the title pawn, which uses the customer's free-and-clear vehicle title as collateral. Borrowers can initiate the process entirely online: they submit a loan application, upload photos of their vehicle for a remote appraisal, and receive an instant estimate of how much they can borrow. Document signing and cash disbursement then take place at the nearest TitleMax store. Requirements are straightforward — a vehicle with a clear title and a valid government-issued ID. TitleMax does perform a credit check, but the company states that most credit types are accepted, making this accessible to borrowers with poor or thin credit histories.

What distinguishes this location is its longevity and customer satisfaction record. It holds a 5.00 out of 5 average rating across 465 Google reviews, with multiple reviewers specifically naming staff members for professional and thorough service. The hybrid online-to-in-store application process reduces the time spent at the branch. Weekday hours run until 7:00 PM, and Saturday hours are available, though the store is closed Sundays. This location does not offer bilingual services.

Honestly assessed, title pawns are a high-cost emergency financing product. TitleMax's website lists 'competitive rates' as a benefit but discloses no APR, fee schedule, or example loan cost anywhere on the store page — borrowers won't know the true cost until they are at the signing table. Title pawns carry real risk: if you cannot repay, the lender can claim your vehicle. This product is appropriate for a genuine short-term cash emergency when no cheaper alternative exists, but it should not be used as routine financing. Borrowers should request the full cost disclosure before signing.
pros: Online application with photo-based vehicle appraisal — no need to visit a branch to get a quote
Most credit types accepted despite a credit check being performed
Borrower keeps driving their vehicle throughout the pawn period
5.00/5 average rating across 465+ Google reviews at this specific location
Over 20 years operating at the Candler Road SE location (open since July 2004)
Weekday hours until 7:00 PM and Saturday availability for working borrowers
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on the website — 'competitive rates' is unverifiable without visiting a store
Vehicle repossession is a real consequence if the pawn is not repaid on time
Applicants must have a clear (lien-free) vehicle title — those with existing auto loans cannot apply
Closed Sundays, limiting access for weekend emergencies
This location does not offer bilingual services
best_for: Georgia residents who own their vehicle outright and need emergency cash quickly
Consumers with poor or thin credit who do not qualify for personal loans or credit cards
Borrowers who need same-day funding and can repay within a short term
People who have exhausted cheaper options and need collateral-backed access to cash
diagnosis: TitleMax title pawns are best suited for Atlanta-area residents with a paid-off vehicle who need emergency cash fast and cannot qualify for lower-cost alternatives due to poor credit. The main caveat is significant: rates are not disclosed upfront, and defaulting on a title pawn puts your vehicle at risk of repossession — making this a product of last resort rather than a routine borrowing tool.
services: Flexible credit underwriting (most credit types accepted)
Vehicle title held as collateral (borrower retains vehicle use)
Access to nearby TitleMax partner store locations across Georgia
